problem id: 06120e47
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHR(6)

examples:
  01010100 -> 11101111
  10000011 -> 11111101
  11110110 -> 11100101
  10010111 -> 11111001
  10101101 -> 11011111
  00111010 -> 11110111
  11101111 -> 11000111
  00100110 -> 11110111
  01001000 -> 11111110

query: 01110011
predicted answer: 11110010
